title: Regex Studio
description: A from-scratch regex workbench: parse to an AST, compile to ε-NFA → DFA → minimal DFA, then run it three ways — a linear DFA, a linear-time Pike VM with captures, and a backtracking VM (backrefs, lookaround). Plus a static ReDoS analyser that proves catastrophic backtracking and synthesises the attack, equivalence checking with witnesses, language enumeration, and DFA→regex synthesis.
